programme.title: Junebug

programme.title: Saving Face
programme.desc: A Chinese-American lesbian and her traditionalist mother are reluctant to go public with secret loves that clash against cultural expectations.

programme.title: Rachel Getting Married
programme.desc: When Kym, returns to the Buchman family home for the wedding of her sister Rachel, she brings a long history of personal crises, family conflict, and tragedy along with her. Rated -R

programme.title: Sunshine Cleaning
programme.desc: Former high school cheerleading captain Rose (Amy Adams) is a thirty-something single mother who cleans houses for a living. Wanting to send her trouble-making son Oscar to a private school, Rose decides to take her married lover's (Steve Zahn) advice.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: A couple find themselves in over their heads when they foster three children

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: When firefighter Jake Carson (John Cena) and his team (Keegan-Michael Key & John Leguizamo) rescue three siblings in the path of a wildfire, they realize no amount of training could have prepared them for their most challenging job yet -- babysitting.

programme.title: Tropic Thunder
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black and Robert Downey Jr. lead an ensemble cast in 'Tropic Thunder,' an action comedy about a group of self-absorbed actors who set out to make the most expensive war film.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on professional poker player Ernie Scherer III, the chief suspect in the 2008 murders of his parents, Charlene and Ernest, in their Castlewood Country Club home in Pleasanton, California.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the 1985 death of Natalie Antonetti, a woman who was part of the Austin, Texas music community. She was found beaten at home by her son, Johnny Goodie, and remained in a coma for two weeks before she died.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the May 5, 2009 murders of the wife and two children of Christopher Coleman, the security chief for televangelist Joyce Meyer Ministries.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2008 murder of educator/artist Carol Kennedy, who was brutally beaten in her home outside Prescott, Arizona. Kennedy's ex-husband, stockbroker Steven DeMocker, became the chief suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: An investigation into the death of Phillip Peatross, who was shot in the bedroom of his girlfriend, Caryn Kelley. Kelley claimed Peatross shot himself, but the police suspected foul play.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report about Kristen Cunnane, a former All-American swimmer who kept quiet about years of sexual abuse by a trusted female teacher and how her decision to go public led to the revelation that she was not alone.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the 2003 murder of Russel Douglas on Whidbey Island, Washington, and how the investigation led to the involvement of Peggy Sue Thomas, a one-time Washington beauty queen-turned-high-end limo driver.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the death of colorful entrepreneur and Las Vegas gambler Gary Triano, who was blown up in his car after finishing a round of golf at the exclusive La Paloma Country Club in Tucson, Arizona in 1996.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report featuring an exclusive interview with Tracey Grissom, who is on trial for the murder of her former husband, Hunter Grissom. Tracey details the abuse she claims to have suffered and the events that led her to shoot and kill him.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: An investigation into the October 2012 death of Bethany Deaton -- whether her death was a suicide, the fundamentalist Christian religious group to which she belonged, her marriage to the group's leader, and the quest by her family for answers.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 1989 disappearance of college student Tiffany Sessions, a case which at the time generated one of the largest manhunts in the history of Florida.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the murder of Vanessa Mintz, who was gunned down at the family owned Saluda Mountain Lodge, in Saluda, North Carolina on Saturday, February 19, 2011.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El pasado delictivo de Parker resurge cuando el NCIS es llamado a Filadelfia para investigar la muerte de un suboficial de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un espantoso acontecimiento en la fiesta de revelación de sexo de un suboficial de la Marina lleva al NCIS al caso de una profesora desaparecida que se popularizó en un podcast de crímenes reales.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un hombre que vivía una doble vida con dos familias. Al mismo tiempo, Anthony lucha con la decisión de ayudar a Erin a investigar a su antiguo compañero, a quien ella sospecha de robar dinero de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que el cuñado de Danny, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se enreda con la mafia y roba su tarjeta de crédito, Danny obliga a Jimmy a enfrentarse a los mafiosos con la ayuda de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer se queja de que la NYPD no ha encontrado al asesino de su hijo, Danny reabre el caso. Esto molesta al detective original, Erin, y a Anthony, que lo habían dejado de lado por falta de pruebas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC es convocado a Wisconsin en busca de un asesino serial, el equipo busca una conexión entre las víctimas para encontrar pistas del sospechoso. Además, Kate tiene dificultades para lidiar con su sobrina, Meg, cuando comienza a comportarse mal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan la muerte de un intruso en Quantico, Jimmy y Kasie se ven expuestos a una biotoxina mortal y deben pedir ayuda a la doctora Carol Wilson para encontrar el antídoto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo investiga la muerte de un cirujano reservista voluntario de los Navy SEALs, se ven obligados a solicitar la ayuda de Kayla (Naomi Grace), la hija de Vance, para llevar a cabo una misión peligrosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El pasado delictivo de Parker resurge cuando el NCIS es llamado a Filadelfia para investigar la muerte de un suboficial de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un espantoso acontecimiento en la fiesta de revelación de sexo de un suboficial de la Marina lleva al NCIS al caso de una profesora desaparecida que se popularizó en un podcast de crímenes reales.

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery
programme.desc: Aired 3/29/2015. Are pieces of the cross Jesus died on still in existence today? The incredible legend of the True Cross is investigated.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/16/2023. Eva Longoria visits the northeastern state of Nuevo Leon, bordering her home state of Texas. As little grows there, and with meat on every menu, inventive and resourceful chefs transform simple ingredients into culinary delights.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/23/2023. Eva Longoria visits the state of Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially ‘Mexican’ originated. She also discovers that the state capital, Guadalajara, boasts some of the country’s most cutting-edge restaurants.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/30/2023. Eva Longoria explores the port gateway between Mexico and the rest of the world, Veracruz, and discovers that in its people remains a defiant spirit, still evident in their character, music, and the bold flavors of their food.

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery
programme.desc: Aired 4/5/2015. Could ancient texts preserved in the sands of Egypt shed light on the nature of Mary Magdalene’s relationship with Jesus?

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery
programme.desc: Aired 3/1/2015. Is an ancient linen cloth bearing the image of a crucified man the very shroud that Joseph wrapped Jesus in?

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery
programme.desc: Aired 3/8/2015. Who was the real John the Baptist? An investigation of a relic believed to be a bone from his finger uncovers proof of John’s powerful legacy.

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery
programme.desc: Aired 3/15/2015. Does an ancient codex discovered in an Egyptian burial cave answer the great Biblical question of why Judas betrayed Jesus?

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery
programme.desc: Aired 3/22/2015. The discovery of an extraordinary 2000 year-old burial box brings to light the remarkable story of Jesus’ brother James.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A soft-spoken cyclist finds a way to shock deputies. A family man remorsefully agrees with police that his COVID-19 fears led him to make a mistake. Officers investigate a car they spot swerving on the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a truck discovers what happens when you don’t lock your door. Police level with a troubled man and implore him to make better choices. An officer acts as a therapist for multiple people and their relationships.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument. A mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence. A 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home. Prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain. Deputies search for a mysterious driver who fled a car crash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details. A couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie. A chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. Deputies arrest a man for creating an unsafe environment for his younger brother. Mom calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifies against the notorious 'Dick and Jane' killer, Nate Haskell. Meanwhile, Nick receives a call from troubled teen Jason McCann to warn him of impending danger.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are on zombie alert when two men initially pronounced dead mysteriously come back to life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a convicted ex-cop, the CSIs stumble upon a list in his prison cell with names of several individuals he believed might have been his wife's true killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A string of deaths, including a gamer found dead on his couch and a newly divorced man at the bottom of a pool, instigate a bet among the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Sara turn to Lady Heather for help in tracking down the culprit responsible for injuring a woman before she was seemingly mauled to death by a mountain lion.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Following his escape, Nate Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, resurfaces when he e-mails a disturbing video to the father of one of his brides, threatening to take her life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston becomes more determined than ever to track down Nake Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, after discovering that he's kidnapped his ex-wife, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After years of pursuit and a countless number of murders, Langston comes face-to-face with serial killer Nate Haskell inside the house where his killing spree began.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Multiple shootings and stabbings on a public tram leave the CSI team with one witness and a lot of questions.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Three suspects come forward with three different reasons why they killed an entire family and the CSI team has to determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While on a date, Stokes realizes a piece of art at an exhibit has decomposing body parts in it, which leads to a full-blown investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The former Mayor of Las Vegas is shot at the Mob Museum and the CSIs embark on a history lesson in search of clues.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a hijacked medevac helicopter with CSI Brody aboard goes missing, the entire team is on hunt.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a Jane Doe is found near the freakish attractions of a 19th-century-inspired traveling sideshow, the team investigates a cast of unusual characters.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe investigar a uno de los suyos cuando Langston es acusado por un antiguo colega de ser parte de los asesinatos del Dr. Jekyll. Primera parte de dos del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las vidas del equipo de CSI están en juego a medida que se acercan al escurridizo Dr. Jekyll, y es posible que más de un miembro del equipo no viva para ver su captura. Segunda parte del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston lucha por su vida después de ser apuñalado por un psicópata, Nate Haskell, mientras que los otros CSI asisten a un funeral que se vuelve mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La histeria se produce cuando un tiburón ataca a una mujer en la piscina de un casino de Las Vegas. El equipo de CSI debe determinar si el asesino es humano o tiburón.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una convención de vampiros y hombres lobo está en el corazón de una investigación del asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sqweegel, un asesino en serie que está castigando a los héroes locales que albergan secretos ocultos, está a la caza en Las Vegas..

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A juvenile gang causes trouble in a San Francisco neighborhood, culminating in a robbery that results in a death. Billy Wilson, who claims innocence, faces mounting evidence and a violent past as the judicial system determines his fate.

programme.desc: After the escape and death of refugee Ramon Salazar, Gillespie, Tibbs and Father DeMarco are all on trial for harboring a fugitive and obstructing justice. Meanwhile, mobster Alvin Epp wants Gillespie fired and will do anything to see that happen.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sparta is sent reeling from a wave of drug overdose cases as Gillespie and Tibbs close in on 'The Crew,' a murderous gang of crack dealers. Eugene bravely identifies the gang members that murdered his close friend, but now his own life is in danger.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Old family conflicts resurface when Officer Luann Corbin's brother Tyler is released from prison and moves back home, driving a wedge between Luann, who thinks it’s a bad idea and that Tyler will never change, and her mother, who welcomes him.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Obsessed with his ex-girlfriend, a disturbed teenager kills her new boyfriend and pins the murder on her stepfather. Althea sees the teen’s hostility at school and realizes how dangerous he is. Can he be stopped from making one more fatal mistake?

programme.desc: Althea Tibbs struggles with depression after witnessing the shocking suicide of a student, and the dead teen’s ex-girlfriend starts dating a guy with a criminal record, who she’s desperate to flee Sparta with to escape from her abusive stepfather.

programme.desc: Cindy loses her mom's earrings after playing with them, and "detective" Peter Brady tries to solve the mystery. But when Carol wants the earrings for a costume ball and they're still not found, the entire family tries to crack the case.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.desc: Archie refuses to let Edith's elderly aunt move into their spare bedroom, even after she's been turned away by every other relative.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's estranged brother returns, after twenty-nine years, to smooth things over before he enters the hospital for a serious operation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Stivics prepare to move to California after Mike is offered a teaching position in Santa Barbara.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is crushed when Mike and Gloria make their other plans after she's prepared a special farewell dinner in their honor.

programme.desc: When the Tri-State fair comes to Raytown, Mama takes in weekend boarders in order to buy a new stove. All "bed" lam breaks loose when they overbook and the family winds up sleeping together in the same room.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama's crazy old Uncle Oscar passes on, he leaves her his talking parrot, Captain Petey, who convinces the family that Mama was left a treasure worth more than $50,000, which is hidden somewhere in the house.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi is persuaded to join a longtime friend from high school in a women's tag team wrestling match. But when Mama accidentally knocks out the friend, she and Naomi must take on the "Masked Mabels" as the "Queen Bees."

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama becomes jealous when Iola spends all her time with her new best friend, Arlene. But she soon discovers that Arlene can hardly wait to get the clinging Iola out of her life.

programme.desc: When Mama overreacts to Bubba coming home drunk, he learns that he has triggered painful memories for Mama of an embarrassing "drunken" incident with Eunice.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Falso testimonio

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, un terrorista en serie apunta a un juez, dos abogados e incluso a una casa de la corte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Condena por Huella de Palma de Mano
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía obtiene una pista sobre una pareja que desapareció en el fin de semana del Día de los Caídos durante un robo en marcha. La evidencia que se encuentra resuelve el brutal crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, cuando la adolescente Tara Munsey desapareció al salir de su trabajo en un restaurante de Virginia, no se sabe si se escapó o si fue víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Evidencia del Jefe
programme.desc: Se detalla el asesinato en Seattle de 1996 de la pareja suburbana Raquel Rivera y Jay Johnson. La evidencia del perro, Chief, de la pareja finalmente vincula a uno de los asesinos a la escena.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Bred from wolves, Huskies have helped humans carve out an existence in Alaska's desolate wilderness. These dogs still maintain many physical adaptations of their wild ancestors, enabling them to withstand the fierce conditions of the Alaskan winter.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: There are more Caribou in Alaska than people! Across the Arctic, they're the lifeblood of many remote communities. But human expansion, and wild predators, have led to their rapid decline.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: One of Alaska's most secretive and efficient predators, Lynx are usually highly elusive… but in Anchorage, houses are being built in the Lynx's territory, forcing these usually shy big cats, to find new ways to survive on the streets.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: In Anchorage, one bird rules the roost…the Bald Eagle. Expert hunters are perfectly adapted to life in tough arctic conditions, but in Anchorage, the secret to their survival… is trash.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: For years, at least four highly elusive wolf packs have lived and hunted on the edge of the wild city of Anchorage. But as the city spreads further and further into wolf country, the wolves are now getting bolder.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to hundreds of black bears. And it's these black bears, that are patrolling the city. With their brains, their brawn and their cunning, these bears have mastered life in this urban jungle.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage has a rather unique resident who is renowned as nature's lumberjack and North America's largest rodent, the beaver. With their powerful teeth, the trees they fell can be huge, and their dams can be seen from space.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to a huge number of wild porcupines, living in the city's parks, gardens, and streets. Almost twice the average size, Anchorage's porcupines search for food here in the city, and find refuge during the bitter Alaskan winters.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Travelling an incredible, 3500 miles through rivers and streams, salmon are Alaska's hardiest resident. But there is one grizzly hazard they face right at the end of their journey. It's the brown bears.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This unique arctic city is home to over 2000 moose! And these notorious animals are running riot… Crossing busy highways, giving birth in backyards, and even doing battle, right here in suburbia!

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This city spends most of the year encased in ice…but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, working faster to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Alaska, one of the last true wildernesses on earth. With 600 square miles of pristine habitat, this state is home to an abundance of wildlife. Herds of caribou roam the plains, wolves stalk in the forest and the brown bears are the kings of the rivers.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This city spends most of the year encased in ice…but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, working faster to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The journey begins in the country's capital, Bogotá. After observing hummingbirds in a garden, Nigel sets out for the mountains of the Andes.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The wildlife expert searches for anacondas, the biggest snakes in Colombia, in the flooded forests of the Amazon.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Nigel Marven visits Santa Maria, the world's tallest coastal mountain, which is home to many creatures found nowhere else on Earth.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Nigel Marven explores Colombia's Pacific coast, which is home to giant geckos, glowing beetles and some bright and vividly coloured frogs.

programme.title: Wild Edens
programme.desc: Wild Edens Russia captures the rare and iconic wildlife that inhabit every corner of this vast country.

programme.title: Wild Edens
programme.desc: At a time of global climate change, Turkey's diverse species adapt to survive during the country's hottest time of year.

programme.title: Wild Edens
programme.desc: At a time of global climate change South Asia's diverse species are pushed to survive as their environment changes around them.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: After their mother is arrested, twins Janelle and Tal are sent to live with their Uncle Al in Atlanta, where Janelle learns about the High Water performing arts school in their new neighborhood.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Forced outsider her comfort zone, Janelle struggles at her High Water audition; Tal confronts his bullies.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The tensions in Zora and Isaiah's relationship come to a head at the Cotillion; Lady Mae makes an overture of peace to Mavis and the result is a revelation that sends Mae into a tailspin.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop and Lady Mae's crumbling marriage threatens to destroy the Greenleaf family, then a two-million dollar IRS tax bill arrives at Calvary, putting the church in danger.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace takes Rochelle up on her offer to help start a legal defense fund; Bishop and Lady Mae ask if parishioner Clara Jackson's Powerball winnings can assist with their IRS bill.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop sends Lady Mae into a tailspin when he surprises her with divorce papers; Grace gives a newspaper interview in Mae's place, while deploying Darius to investigate Rochelle.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Lady Mae visits world-famous Pastor Maxine Patterson and endures the Bishop's final attempt to win her back at a Round Table party; Connie asks if Grace is interested in running Calvary.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop and Lady Mae make alternate plans after Clara denies them the check for the IRS bill; Grace tends to Sophia when a medical emergency sends her daughter to the hospital.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost seeks vengeance due to the ill will of Tommy Egan; Tasha vows to get even with Ghost for the murder of Terry Silver; Tariq and Tommy mourn an old friend; the AUSA's office is under new leadership.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tommy lays low after his Mustang is riddled with bullets; tensions run high with Ghost and Jason; Tommy enlists LaKeisha to help with his business; Tasha confronts Ghost about Terry Silver.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Dre remains in federal custody; Jason instructs Tommy and Ghost to kidnap Alicia Jiminez; Tommy teaches LaKeisha the drug game; Tariq's business begins to flourish; Tasha has a business plan of her own.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha sparks a new flame; Ghost utilizes his resources in an attempt to kill Tommy; Tariq's in over his head with the Italians; Dre forms an unlikely alliance; Proctor hatches a plan to gain custody of his daughter.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha revisits old habits when she begins to recruit soldiers for her new empire; Tariq pulls a ruse on Vincent; Proctor warns Tommy about a snitch; Ghost plans to take care of the snitch on his own terms.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Poles will be attached and hung off the dump truck off the ground. Plexiglas box is buried in the sand and filled with water and sand. Contestants will be standing on a car that is suspended over the water by a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on top of a platform that covers a water tank. A blindfolded contestant is guided by their partner's verbal commands to a tank filled with leeches. Contestants will be standing a tube that is suspended in the air from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on the platform that is suspended. Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes. A glass tube is suspended vertically from a crane with the top sealed and the bottom open and submerges in a pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be in a dingy that is being towed by a net attached to the back end of the schooner. Contestants will be standing on a plank above the water. Contestants have Thanksgiving dinner. Contestant will start on a platform above the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound to a chair, that will be suspend over the water. Dressed in a dog bite protection suit, contestants must climb out of a specially designed chimney and into an enclosed room. Contestant must drive their car towards a pipe ramp.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are standing on top of one of two semi trucks traveling. Contestants will play a game to determine how many disgusting donuts they will have to eat. Contestants will be standing on a truss structure that is above the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under individual helicopters. Each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt the contestants will be standing at a podium on the roof of a 5 story building. The first contestant loads a piece of cow stomach onto a catapult, which will launch the stomach down range to their partner

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt, each team is seated in the front of their own car. Male contestants head is placed through a hole cut into the bottom of a slightly angled plexi-sewer pipe, his arms are shackled around the outside of the pipe.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above the water wearing weighted boots. Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads are placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, each contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended in the air off the sides of a train box car. In a banquet room, couples will feed each other as much disgusting food as they can.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will be riding on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. Male contestant is placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A rope will be suspended between two helicopters. Contestants will be standing in a tall cage. Contestants must discover a key to a ‘box of worms', which will be transferred onto a scale.

programme.desc: The Angels assist a man who has not been able to share a painful secret with his family.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: After her mother dies, 10-year-old Danni Blake is determined to find the father she never knew.

programme.title: Karate Killer
programme.desc: Kiba is back again, but this time he has fallen from grace and sent to prison for all the violent acts he has committed. Once he's out, he begins working as a bodyguard in a club that is crawling with gangsters.

programme.title: Slaughter In San Francisco [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: A Chinese-American cop, skilled in martial arts, battles the most powerful criminal gang in San Francisco that is responsible for the death of his partner.

programme.title: Good Guys Wear Black
programme.desc: Action superstar Chuck Norris stars as John T. Booker, the former leader of an elite commando unit who must uncover the reason why his former squad members are being systematically murdered one by one. Anne Archer and James Franciscus co-star.

programme.title: A Force Of One
programme.desc: In this thrill-a-minute film, action superstar Chuck Norris stars as a martial arts champion enlisted to help track down a serial killer...and the man responsible for the murder of his adoptive son. Jennifer O'Neill and Clu Gulager also star.

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is back in this action-packed martial arts showcase co-starring the legendary Lee Van Cleef. Norris takes on his adoptive brother and a training camp where terrorists are being taught the secret killing techniques of the ninja!

programme.title: An Eye For An Eye (1981)
programme.desc: A SFPD undercover narcotics cop aims to avenge his partner's death and destroy a drug-smuggling ring operated by the Chinese Triads.

programme.title: Lone Wolf McQuade
programme.desc: A maverick Texas Ranger throws down his guns to indulge his talents in the martial arts when he meets his match in the leader of a gun-smuggling ring.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: Ander Gonzalez y Gabriela Uriarte preparan: ensalada de bogavante.

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: Ander Gonzalez y Gabriela Uriarte preparan: guiso marinero de patata, borraja y cardo.

programme.title: A Bocados: Graten de brassicas
programme.desc: Ander Gonzalez y Gabriela Uriarte preparan: graten de brassicas.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Ajillo (Ajo)
programme.desc: El chef Luis “Tigretón” León prepara tres suculentos platos que seguramente complacerán a cualquier amante del ajo.

programme.title: Cocina latina: La Especialidad de España: Cerdo
programme.desc: Simples y sofisticadas es la mejor manera de describir las recetas tradicionales españolas del chef Luis "Tigretón" León. Nos muestra por qué la trucha y el jamón son los nuevos mar y tierra.

programme.title: Comfort Food
programme.desc: ¡No hay nada como la comida criolla! En este episodio, el chef Ignacio Barrios nos enseña y nos cuenta sobre sus primeros encuentros con la cocina peruana profesional.

programme.title: Comfort Food
programme.desc: Fácil y rico, no hay mejor combinación. Recordando su infancia, el chef Ignacio nos enseña a preparar tres deliciosos platos que hacía su madre.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Finaliza la primera temporada y volveremos a ver a Kumar en Santiago de Surco. Preparará un pescado en tres platos distintivos llamado fortuno. ¿Funcionará?

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar está interesado en saber cuál es el sabor de la doncella, así que fuimos a Lince a buscar este pescado y verá que da como resultado tres platos que preparará. ¡Seamos parte de lo que viene a continuación, vamos!

programme.title: Rebelde sin cocina
programme.desc: FG lanzó su carrera en el mercado subterráneo de Toronto (TUM), por lo que está emocionado de participar nuevamente. Con su negocio creciendo minuto a minuto, FG debe comenzar a buscar los próximos pasos dentro de la marca.

programme.title: Rebelde sin cocina
programme.desc: Los eventos se hacen cada vez más grandes. Desde su primer pop-up en una cafetería hipster hasta un evento gastronómico independiente masivo, FG ha recorrido un largo camino. El Museo Real de Ontario (ROM) ha solicitado que FG aparezca en su evento.

programme.title: Parilla sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Matt y el equipo preparan una fiesta de verano: pierna de cordero con hierbas de verano, lomo de cerdo al romero a la parrilla con salsa de bayas silvestres, trucha a la parrilla con duraznos y ensalada de tomate.

programme.title: Parilla sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Matt y el equipo de Road Grill pasan el día jugando en el parque acuático. El pollo asado con mantequilla de lima-limón asado, los pinchos de pez espada a la parrilla con salsa caribeña y las chuletas de cerdo son las estrellas.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¿Qué es divertido para toda la familia? ¡La noche de pizza! El chef Spencer Watts prepara dos sencillas y económicas pizzas para un delicioso plato estilo familiar.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: Los platos de la India son el ejemplo ideal de las cenas para la familia entera. El presentador Spencer Watts hace uso de sabores audaces para preparar un pollo con mantequilla clásico y un refrescante lassi de mango.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: Al pescado le encantan las especias y al chef Spencer Watts le encanta el pescado, por lo que trae el delicioso mundo de las especias al pez mantequilla y a la langosta junto con algunos lados refrescantes.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts comparte algunas de sus recetas favoritas de caballa y mejillón en las que destacan las vibrantes y frescas hierbas aromáticas.

programme.title: Ponlo a la parrilla
programme.desc: En este capítulo, Christian Bravo prepara un delicioso carpaccio de solomillo fino con pesto y una picaña ahumada con una bebida Johnnie Ginger.

programme.title: Ponlo a la parrilla
programme.desc: Christian Bravo, acompañado de su amigo Jacomo, cocina deliciosas brochetas y un sándwich tri tip con un refrescante Johnnie Ginger.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: Es el apogeo del otoño y las cosas se están enfriando en el granero, pero con la esperanza de calentar las cosas con las festividades, South Pond organiza un brunch para celebrar la cosecha de otoño y la comunidad local de agricultores y proveedores.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: Las habilidades de Danielle para organizar fiestas de menor tamaño se ponen a prueba cuando organiza una cena íntima con música en vivo en Iron Horse Ranch.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué tipo de barbacoa reina en la ciudad de Kansas, Houston o Carolina del Norte? Tony viaja a las tres ciudades para probar por sí mismo los secretos que esconden las salsas, los huesos de madera y los fumadores lentos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Ninja Storm
programme.desc: Cam travels back in time to the Wind Ninja Academy to gain the powers he needs to become the Green Ranger and to save the younger versions of his parents from the menace of his evil uncle, Lothor.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Ninja Storm
programme.desc: Lothor seeks revenge on Cam by sending five monsters at once to destroy the city.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Ninja Storm
programme.desc: Cam's weird behavior comes at a bad time when Fragra captures two of the Rangers in perfume bottles.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Ninja Storm
programme.desc: In an attempt to win over the hearts and minds of the Earth, Lothor and Mr. Ratwell produce a sitcom and administer a love potion.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Ninja Storm

programme.desc: Benkei continues to train Bladers, with Kite, Eight, and Ren joining Shinobu, and Zyro.

programme.title: Beyblade Shogun Steel
programme.desc: While on a beach vacation, Zyro and the others solve a mystery about a supposed Sea Monster.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Lumino cavern is under attack!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and Kord have been trying to create a fusion shot: two slugs shot at exactly the same time that can merge their powers!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Eli and the Shane Gang find themselves trapped in the Deep Caverns underneath Slugterra they discover a whole new type of danger threatening to escape.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Armed with his powerful new weapon the Gatling Blaster, Blakk's unstoppable battle train threatens to run roughshod over all of Slugterra — unless Eli can master his new Double Barrel Blaster and come up with a powerful fusion move in time to stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang find themselves competing in the Slugball Championship — a rough and tumble cross between hockey, slugslinging and rugby — with deadly random obstacles thrown in for fun!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them.

programme.title: A Boy Named Charlie Brown
programme.desc: Snoopy and all of your favorite Peanuts characters make their full-length feature debut in this classic animated movie based on the loveable comic strip by Charles M. Schulz.

programme.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: In the dark of night aliens fly their war ships to earth and abduct all the parents in Jimmy’s hometown of Retroville. So it’s up to Jimmy to rescue the abducted parents.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
programme.desc: A heartless industrialist has an evil plan: to level Arnold's neighborhood and build a huge shopping mall. With time running out, someone needs to save the day. And that someone is Arnold.

programme.title: A Boy Named Charlie Brown
programme.desc: Snoopy and all of your favorite Peanuts characters make their full-length feature debut in this classic animated movie based on the loveable comic strip by Charles M. Schulz.

programme.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: In the dark of night aliens fly their war ships to earth and abduct all the parents in Jimmy’s hometown of Retroville. So it’s up to Jimmy to rescue the abducted parents.

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven
programme.desc: A wonderful, song-filled feature about an unlovable, murdered mutt (Burt Reynolds) who returns to Earth to do a good deed. When he adopts an orphan girl who can communicate with animals and help lead him to his killer.

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven 2
programme.desc: Charlie and Itchy are back! Those lovable mutts from the treasured Family hit "All Dogs Go To Heaven" return for an all-new Animated Musical Adventure. Features the voices of Charlie Sheen, Dom DeLuise and Sheena Easton.

programme.title: The Secret of N.I.M.H.
programme.desc: Fun, Drama and Suspense come vividly to life in this enchanting cartoon Fantasy, based on Robert O'Brien's award-winning tale of a timid mouse who becomes a heroine in spite of herself.

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven
programme.desc: A wonderful, song-filled feature about an unlovable, murdered mutt (Burt Reynolds) who returns to Earth to do a good deed. When he adopts an orphan girl who can communicate with animals and help lead him to his killer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order to join the Sons of Garmadon, Zane (aka Snake Jaguar) participates in a deadly motorcycle initiation race.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Zane’s near demise at the hands of Mr. E forces the ninja to flee aboard the Bounty, where they discover that a transmission Zane intercepted may reveal the hidden location of the Quiet One.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi venture deep into Primeval’s Eye in search of the third Oni Mask, the ninja attempt to fix the Bounty and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi search the Oni Temple for the last mask, the ninja are taken hostage and discover Princess Harumi’s true intentions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja appeal to the police commissioner of Ninjago in an effort to help save Lloyd and thwart Harumi’s efforts to resurrect the evil Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just when the Ninja think they have saved the day, Lord Garmadon returns to NINJAGO, and frees Harumi, who encourages him to “achieve his true potential” by conquering the one thing that has always stood in his way… his son, Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja race to save Lloyd, as a more powerful-than-ever Lord Garmadon creates an enormous Colossi to help him rule NINJAGO and defeat the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Ninjago has become a bleak, enemy-occupied city ruled by Emperor Garmadon and his Sons of Garmadon biker gang.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay, Kai and Zane are interrogated by Iron Baron, the ruthless warlord to the Dragon Hunters. Feeling threatened, the Ninja choose to keep their identities secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the Ninja are put into a cage aboard a hunting party, they learn that their elemental powers will be used to help lure a dragon. Undercover, Cole learns Iron Baron is in search for Firstbourne’s nest – the Mother of All Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a flashback of when Jay first meets Master Wu, Jay awakens to find he’s still with his caged friends returning from their hunting party. Forced into slave labor, Jay’s inspired by his dream of his master when Wu told him to ‘build the impossible’.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Dareth warns his friends just as the Sons of Garmadon ambush their secret headquarters. The Elemental Masters are each captured, except for Lloyd, Nya, Dareth and Skylor, who escape within Nya’s escape vehicle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and his friends lick their wounds, Mystake shares how she managed to escape the Sons of Garmadon earlier -- she’s a shape-shifting Oni.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wastelands, Faith teaches the Ninja how to master their chain rifles and they hunt a dragon. As teen Wu struggles, Kai encourages him to not give up in a lesson of confidence.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Harumi has outed Mystake as the ‘Fake Harumi’. Mystake reveals her true Oni form and battles Garmadon, allowing Skylor to absorb some of his power and escape. In the Realm of Oni and Dragon, the Ninja return to rescue Faith, only to discover it’s a trap.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Garmadon is enraged by the loss of Harumi and releases his wrath by ordering the Oni Titan to turn Ninjago City to ash. Lloyd fears they won’t be able to endure much longer – where are his friends?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Atop their dragons, the Ninja return to Ninjago City amidst Garmadon’s vicious attack. Master Wu and the Ninja join up with Lloyd, Nya, and Dareth and they celebrate their reunion.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon’s son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can’t be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines’ inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd’s rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para un día de diversión! Desde cantar con globos hasta imitar sonidos de animales, canciones infantiles, partes del cuerpo, citas con el abuelo, sueños de dinosaurios y confiar en el médico, ¡es un día de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Bienvenido al mundo de los pequeños modales, donde los Little Angels enseñarán valiosas lecciones de amabilidad, empatía y buenos modales.
